characters.appearance: Male, likely in his 30s or 40s, of Asian descent. He has short, textured greyish hair and a light goatee/beard. He has a medium build and a light complexion.
characters.demeanor: Confident, engaging, and expressive. He transitions from a reflective tone to an enthusiastic and celebratory one.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे लगता था कि मेरी English काफी अच्छी है। [I thought my English was quite good.]
Character A says: But then I tried Supernova's AI tutor, [But then I tried Supernova's AI tutor,]
Character A says: और समझ आया कि speaking में confidence की कमी है। [and realized I lacked confidence in speaking.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by stating a relatable misconception about their English skills.
- Introduces the Supernova AI tutor as the reality check.
- Establishes the core problem: a lack of speaking confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: THIS IS WHAT MY ENGLISH SOUNDED LIKE 90 DAYS AGO... 81% I would love to have dinner with my friends MUJHE LAGTA THA KI MERI ENGLISH KAAFI ACHHI HAI BUT THEN I TRIED SUPERNOVA'S AI TUTOR Evaluating your pronunciation... Evaluating your fluency... AUR SAMAJH AAYA KI SPEAKING MEIN CONFIDENCE KI KAMI HAI Your Speaking Level 66% Intermediate Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova ने मुझे real-world situations के लिए तैयार किया, [Supernova prepared me for real-world situations,]
Character A says: और मैंने रोज़ सिर्फ 10 minutes practice की। [and I practiced for just 10 minutes daily.]
Character A says: Supernova app download करो, and start speaking confidently! [Download the Supernova app, and start speaking confidently!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the practical benefit of real-world preparation.
- Emphasizes the low time commitment (10 minutes a day).
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call to action to download the app.
